rendered_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.
notes: Wave 0 rollback regression PASS — chatglm preserves iter22 (#1029) BREAKTHROUGH FULL-RESEND 4-chunk pattern post-rollback. Loaded chatglm.cn WITHOUT DevTools (anti-debugger satisfied), hard-reloaded to fresh session, pasted PII prompt (RRN 901010-1234567) and submitted via Enter. Within ~15s the assistant bubble rendered as 'ChatGLM' with the canonical Korean warning text intact: '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.' Contains BOTH expected_text='차단' AND '민감한 개인정보' sensitive marker — all progressive chunks (A→B→D-1→D-2) concatenated into a single visible bubble identical to iter22 baseline. Conversation title set to '未命名对话' (anonymous chat) confirming engine intercept fired and prevented LLM response. No native error fallback (no '系统稍微有点忙'), no truncation, no PARTIAL/PARTIAL_THINK_ONLY symptoms. Page stable through 25s post-submit observation window; blue spinner kept ticking but no further DOM changes (LLM blocked, warning persistent). Rollback preserves iter22 behavior 1:1 — A/B/D-1/D-2 4-chunk canonical chatglm warning delivery pattern remains intact. Pairs cleanly with #1125 baidu PROBE OK and #1127 character.ai OK — Wave 0 rollback is safe for chat-bubble-injection services. Contrast with #1124 chatgpt FAIL_NOT_RENDERED which uses a separate envelope/encryption layer not yet covered by rollback scope.
